metadata.description: haxlys's curated agent skills marketplace. Vendored copies from MIT/Apache-licensed upstream repos + references to trusted skill packs.

plugins.name: web-design-reviewer
plugins.description: Visual inspection of websites to identify and fix design issues. Vendored from github/awesome-copilot (MIT).

plugins.name: web-component-design
plugins.description: Master React, Vue, and Svelte component patterns. Vendored from wshobson/agents (MIT).

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0). Bundles 5 specialized sub-skills loaded on demand via `agent-browser skills get <name>`: electron (Electron desktop apps), slack (Slack workspaces), vercel-sandbox (microVM Chrome), agentcore (AWS Bedrock cloud browser), dogfood (exploratory QA).

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: obra/superpowers — TDD, debugging, planning, code review, worktree workflows. Referenced upstream (always latest).
